The green blocks (N) are at cols 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53. But the blue region (S) is at cols 31-53 for rows 0-11. For rows 13-17, there's no S - it's all B and G.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Character moved from cols 20-22 to cols 15-16 with LEFT
# Let me check if the character can also move up/down by trying MOUSE
# First, let me see where the character is now and test RIGHT

# Current character position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
char_pos = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        char_pos = (min(rows), max(rows), min(cols), max(cols))
        print(f"Character (b): rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break

# Test RIGHT to move back
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print(f"\nAfter RIGHT: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")

# Check new position
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Character after RIGHT: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
